news.paragraph: Okta is experiencing positive momentum after KeyBanc raised its price target to $103, citing increased security spending. While the stock has recently seen a 23% price jump and must contend with past security concerns, analysts are noting its strategic moves in AI and its position in the industry outlook. Traders should weigh this recent price volatility and the upgraded target against the company's ongoing security profile.
